hero_sub: Speak — FlowVoice transcribes, corrects and types for you. Set up below to get started.
step1_desc: Go to Connections and paste your Groq (free) or GitHub Models key.
step2_desc: In General, select Professional for formal text or Casual for everyday messages.
step3_desc: Use {} in any text field to start recording. Press again to stop and type.
desc_writing_style: Professional rewrites to formal language; Casual keeps your natural voice; Direct delivers near-raw text.
desc_prompt_version: v2 Beta: refined prompts with paragraphs, preservation of technical English terms and removal of false starts. v1: previous simple stable version.
desc_operation_mode: Dictation types under cursor; Translation translates your speech; Search queries AI with internet access.
desc_search_provider: Defines which AI responds when you use the Search shortcut.
desc_search_model: groq/compound searches the web in real time. groq/compound-mini is faster. llama-3.3-70b-versatile has no internet access.
desc_translation_lang: Target language when using the translation shortcut.
desc_startup: Starts minimized to the tray every time the computer boots.
desc_mute: Silences the system during recording to prevent PC sounds from contaminating the transcription.
desc_pwd: If set, the 'Show Keys' button in the Connections tab will ask for this password before revealing your API keys. Leave empty to disable protection.
desc_api_keys: You can enter more than one key separated by commas to enable the automatic failover pool.
desc_tavily: Paste your Tavily key here to enable real internet search in Search mode.
desc_whisper_model: tiny/base = fast and light | small/medium = good balance | large-v3 = maximum accuracy
desc_whisper_device: cpu = processor (always works) | cuda = Nvidia GPU (much faster, requires CUDA drivers installed)
desc_ai_provider: Primary provider. If it fails, the system automatically tries the others (failover).
pwd_confirm_subtitle: Enter the current password to change it.
pwd_reveal_title: 🔐  Enter your password to view keys
pwd_forgot_body: The password cannot be recovered. The only option is to reset all API keys and the password, returning to the initial state.
conn_info_title: 💡  How to get your keys (all free):
conn_info_body:
• GitHub Models (recommended — free for devs): github.com/marketplace/models
• Groq (ultra fast — free): console.groq.com/keys
• Google Gemini (free quota): aistudio.google.com
• OpenAI (paid/premium): platform.openai.com
conn_key_placeholder: Paste here (multiple keys separated by commas)
web_info_title: ⚡  Only Groq supports real-time web search
web_info_body: Groq's compound-beta model includes native internet access (weather, news, prices, etc.). GitHub Models, OpenAI and standard Gemini respond only based on training knowledge, without real-time data.
tavily_title: 🌐  Tavily — real-time web search (1,000 searches/month free)
tavily_body:
With the Tavily key configured, Search mode queries the internet in real time for any question (weather, news, prices, etc.). Without the key, Search mode uses only the AI's training knowledge.
Get your free key at: app.tavily.com — no credit card required.
whisper_note: ℹ️  Local Whisper transcribes your audio directly on your computer, without internet. Smaller models (tiny/base) are fast but less accurate; large models (large-v3) are very accurate but require at least 8 GB of RAM and a dedicated GPU for good performance.
hotkey_hint: 💡 Click Capture and press the desired key combination (e.g. Ctrl + Shift + Space). Press Esc to cancel.
test_conn_no_key: ⚠️  No key configured for this provider.
update_notif_msg:
A new version (v{}) of FlowVoice is available!
Click to download.
wiz_welcome_desc:
Let's set everything up in under 2 minutes.
We need a free API key to activate the AI that will polish your texts.
wiz_welcome_feat3: Your keys are saved only on your computer
wiz_provider_desc: Select the provider and paste your key. All options have a free tier.
wiz_style_desc: Choose how the AI should format your dictated texts.
wiz_style_prof_desc: Rewrites to clear, formal language. Ideal for emails, docs, and work messages.
wiz_style_casual_desc: Fixes only the essentials, keeping your natural voice. Great for chats and social media.
wiz_style_raw_desc: Delivers near-raw text, only basic punctuation. For total control.
wiz_hotkey_desc: Set the global shortcut to activate dictation anywhere in Windows.
wiz_hotkey_hint: Click the box below and press the keys
wiz_done: 🎉 All set! Click Finish to save and start using FlowVoice.
wiz_close_tooltip: Configure at least one provider to continue
wiz_get_keys: No key? Get one for free:
